messages.speaker: Patient
messages.text: My knee is hurting very bad.

messages.speaker: Doctor
messages.text: Oh. Why did you hurt your knee?

summary.greeting: Hello John, we’re here to help you with your knee pain and make sure you feel better soon.
summary.what_we_found: You mentioned that your knee is hurting very badly. We didn’t identify a specific cause today, but we’ll keep working to understand what’s going on.
summary.your_vitals: We didn’t take your vitals today, but let us know if you’d like us to check your blood pressure, heart rate, or other measurements at your next visit.
summary.your_medications: No medications were prescribed today, but we’ll discuss options if needed after further evaluation.
summary.watch_for: If your knee pain gets worse, or if you notice swelling, redness, or have trouble walking, please come back or call us right away.
summary.next_steps: Follow up with us as needed, or if your doctor recommends another visit. Rest your knee and avoid activities that make the pain worse.
summary.closing: Take care, John, and don’t hesitate to reach out if you need anything—we’re here to help!

html:
Hello John, we’re here to help you with your knee pain and make sure you feel better soon.

What We Found Today

You mentioned that your knee is hurting very badly. We didn’t identify a specific cause today, but we’ll keep working to understand what’s going on.

Your Vital Signs

We didn’t take your vitals today, but let us know if you’d like us to check your blood pressure, heart rate, or other measurements at your next visit.

Your Medications

No medications were prescribed today, but we’ll discuss options if needed after further evaluation.

Things To Watch For

If your knee pain gets worse, or if you notice swelling, redness, or have trouble walking, please come back or call us right away.

Your Next Steps

Follow up with us as needed, or if your doctor recommends another visit. Rest your knee and avoid activities that make the pain worse.

Take care, John, and don’t hesitate to reach out if you need anything—we’re here to help!
